title: DMV Funding Readiness Scorecard
seoTitle: DMV Funding Readiness Scorecard | DMV BizFund OS
metaDescription: Use the DMV Funding Readiness Scorecard to understand what to prepare before applying for business funding.
summary: A practical scorecard to help business owners understand what to prepare before applying.
body: The scorecard helps owners organize revenue, time in business, documentation, funding use, and readiness signals before applying. It is not an approval engine. It is a clarity engine.
bestFor: Owners who were declined by a bank
Operators who want to avoid funding panic

title: Local Business Cash Flow Gap Calculator
seoTitle: Local Business Cash Flow Gap Calculator | DMV BizFund OS
metaDescription: Estimate your local business cash-flow gap before applying for funding or talking to a referral partner.
summary: Estimate the gap between what is due and what is coming in.
body: The cash-flow gap calculator helps owners estimate the size and timing of the problem. A vague panic number is not a capital plan.
